task_completion.description: The agent opens a mapping software application (e.g., Google Earth Pro, Marble).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window displaying a mapping interface (globe or map view) is visible on the desktop.

task_completion.description: The agent opens the tool or dialog to create a new polygon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Polygon', 'Add Polygon', or 'Properties' dialog box is open.

task_completion.description: The polygon is named 'TFR Zone Alpha'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' field in the polygon properties dialog contains the text 'TFR Zone Alpha'.

task_completion.description: The polygon vertices are set to the specified coordinates in the Nevada desert.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties dialog shows the specific coordinates (e.g., 36.2358, -115.0842) entered in the list of vertices, OR the map view shows a rectangular polygon drawn in the desert area near Nellis AFB.

task_completion.description: The polygon style is set to a red fill with approximately 50% transparency and a solid red border.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Style' or 'Color' tab in the dialog shows Red selected for Lines and Area, with Opacity set near 50% for the Area. Alternatively, the polygon on the map appears red and semi-transparent.

task_completion.description: The polygon is saved/exported as a KML file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' file dialog is visible showing the filename 'tfr_zone_alpha.kml' and the destination folder '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: The agent must not use terminal commands (e.g., cat, echo, python scripts) to generate the KML file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show a terminal window being used to write the KML content manually.

integrity.description: The agent must interact with the mapping application's GUI to create the polygon.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the mapping application's interface, menus, or dialogs being used, rather than a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent should not simply copy a pre-existing file to the destination.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file creation process (entering coordinates, setting style) must be observed in the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The polygon 'TFR Zone Alpha' is a rectangle located in the Nevada desert near Nellis AFB. Verified vertices: [36.2358, -115.0842], [36.2358, -115.0156], [36.1872, -115.0156], [36.1872, -115.0842]. The expected visual style is a red fill with ~50% transparency.
